nasb.text: Moreover, you shall set the gold altar of incense before the ark of the testimony, and set up the veil for the doorway to the tabernacle.

esv.text: And you shall put the golden altar for incense before the ark of the testimony, and set up the screen for the door of the tabernacle.

cnv.text: 把燒香用的金壇安放在法櫃前，掛上帳幕的門簾。

ccb.text: 把烧香的金坛放在约柜前面，挂上圣幕入口的帘子。
